title: Unique Hot Pink Standing Number 1 Foil Balloon 30", Packaged
features: 1 Giant Hot Pink Number 1 Shaped Standing Balloon
Number balloon measures 76 cm when fully inflated (ships flat)
Inflate with air only, DO NOT use with helium
Ideal for a 1st birthday party, or combined with other number balloons for any age
Combine with other hot pink party supplies from Unique Party
description: From the manufacturer Giant Hot Pink 34" Foil Number Balloons Let everyone know the milestone that's being celebrated with these Giant Foil Number Standing Balloons! These number balloons will make a dazzling addition to any birthday, graduation, engagement, new years or anniversary party! Simply fill them with air and create an eye-catching centrepiece!
